title: cineraria albicans
intro: Cineraria albicans, also known as Baboon's Beard, is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to South Africa. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, treat skin conditions such as acne and eczema, and act as an antibacterial agent. The health benefits of Cineraria albicans include its potential to improve wound healing, reduce scarring, and alleviate symptoms of rheumatism and arthritis. In herbal preparations, Cineraria albicans is often used in tinctures, salves, and creams to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
